title: Hermitcraft Skinpack
body:
# Hermitcraft Skin Pack
Hermitcraft Skin Pack is a resource pack designed for [Legacy Skins](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy-skins) an addon for [Legacy 4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j).

Ever wondered what it would look like if hermitcraft teamed up with 4JStudios to release a skin pack? or just want to play with your favourite skin, this pack has got you covered. 

# How to use:
- Simply add this pack to your resource packs and enable it.
- Enjoy. :)

# Current List and Plans:
